name: clean pelvis MRI — uterine fibroid, benign

report.technique: Pelvic MRI at 3T including T2W, T1W, DWI, and dynamic contrast-enhanced sequences.
report.findings: Uterus: 35 mm intramural fibroid in the anterior body, low T2 signal, without degeneration. Cervix: normal. Right adnexa: normal. Left adnexa: normal. Bladder: distended, normal wall. Bowel: normal. Bones: no aggressive lesion.
report.impression:
1. 35 mm anterior intramural uterine fibroid, benign features.
2. Normal adnexa bilaterally.
